pageDescription: Start analysis with a file, link, or pasted text.

firstSource.title: Add one source to get started.
firstSource.description: Drop in a file, link, or pasted text and OpenCairn will prepare a summary, suggested questions, and a first note.

file.label: Upload file
file.hint: PDF, document, image, audio, video, and Markdown files are supported.

text.label: Pasted text
text.placeholder: Paste the material you want to organize.

firstSource.target: Choose where to save it, then start analysis.
firstSource.followup: When it finishes, you can ask questions immediately or open the generated note and keep editing.

errors.linkInvalid: Enter an http or https link.
errors.generic: Could not start. Try again in a moment.

legacy.title: Existing import paths
legacy.description: Use these when you need account-connected import or prepared ZIP migration.
legacy.label: Existing import method

drive.notConfigured: Google OAuth credentials must be configured by an admin.

notion.instructions: Use this compatibility import only if you already have a Notion Markdown & CSV export ZIP.
notion.connectorHint: For most migrations, use Markdown ZIP first. Notion account-connected import belongs in the connector flow.

markdown.instructions: Upload a Markdown export ZIP. OpenCairn imports folder structure, .md files, and relative-path attachments.

errors.importLimitExceeded: Too many imports in progress. Wait for the existing one to finish.
